title: Chapter 23
content:
Chapter 23: Chapter 23: Arielle Wanted To Get A Massage, Using Your Three Limbs!!!

"I promise... I’m your honest boy, after all, Mom ~" she whispered, nodding gently.

’Hehe... let’s see how much longer you can hold back your moans, Mom~’ Owen smiled wickedly, already imagining her desperate voice, as he slowly made his way.

Owen...a certified shameless man at boot. No one will claim that number one spot as long as he exists... though only his own story.

Then... Owen detached his body from hers, and she looked back with a hint of dismay.

Arielle regretted what she said, only to take a few minutes, a few minutes, which was just too short!

"I will come by after I take a bath, Mom... so be prepared~" Owen entered his room, deeply satisfied with making even more progress.

As for Arielle, she couldn’t forget the look on Owen’s face.

How much did she love her son to want to experience such taboo desires?

Her mind was honestly looking forward to the massage much more than the phone call from her husband.

Owen’s face and his actions were causing havoc in her mind, twisting them as she imagined doing the most taboo thing...yet it felt like it wasn’t a bad thing.

’Get your grip Arielle....it’s just a simple massage and nothing more! Massage.. just a simple massage from your son, your boy nothing more.’ She keeps repeating the words in her mind, as she makes her way to her room.

She needs to prepare too, as something unexpected might happen!

...

Ding!

[ MILF Quest Completed!]

[Evaluating the Host performance...ding...ding...ding..]

[S+ Host Performance!]

[ Rewards: MILF Token 2 / 50 Exp Points Gained!]

[Arielle Affection Went Up, the hot rod rubbing behind her back is making her want more.]

[ Note: Arielle wanted to get a massage, using your three limbs!!!..(⁠~⁠‾⁠▿⁠‾⁠)⁠~ ]

’Hoho... what a slutty mom. I guess I don’t have a choice~’ Owen smirked as he read the system note.

The system never stopped surprising him...time and time again.

Owen then went to take his bath, cleaning his body with precision. For a man like him, proper scrubbing was necessary.

"Ahh... what a good bath.’’ He exited the bathroom after thirty minutes, feeling fully refreshed and then he put on his clothes and went through Arielle’s room.

...

Knock... knock... knock...

"I’m here, Mom..." Owen knocked on the door of Arielle’s room with renewed vigor.

"Coming~" Her voice alone was enough to melt him, causing his cock to turn rock-solid once again.

’Heh.., I wonder what Father would do if he found out his "son" was massaging his wife.’ Owen was finally embracing the villain role.

Creak...

The door opened, and his breathing completely stopped.

The scene before him was just too erotic!

Arielle was standing there wearing nothing but a white towel, barely covering her assets which were bulging like crazy.

"Oh my... don’t look at me like that~" She shifted her weight, acting shy about showing off her fair silky smooth skin and her voluptuous body that’s showing a top-tier MILF.

Arielle really loves long housewife clothes and dresses, as she wanted to hide her body...so showing her everything to her son is completely new.

Though she’s not comfortable, she’s even secretly trying her best to show her assets!

Not a motherly act at all..

Owen’s breathing recovered, though he was barely holding onto his sanity.

He was going to pluck out her fruit, the brains out of Arielle when the time finally came!

" I’m just appreciating the most beautiful woman in existence, Mom." Owen entered the room. It smelled incredibly good...a unique, signature scent of her own.

It was the same smell he had inhaled deeply when his face was pressed against her tits earlier.

"What a silly boy... You never stop saying things like that." She slowly moved toward her bed while holding her phone.

"But I’m not lying, though... You really are the most beautiful woman I know, Mom." Owen didn’t wait for her response as he moved toward the bed, too.

A massage using his three limbs was about to begin!

"Now, lie your body down comfortably, Mom. I will do all the work..." Owen signaled for her to lie on the bed.

She had already prepared everything necessary, as if she wanted the massage to happen without any further delay.

"Okay... but don’t do anything bad. I’m calling your dad, so don’t act spoiled, okay~?" She turned her head, looking up at Owen’s innocent smile.

"Hehe... of course, Mom. I’m just here to remove those tensed muscles of yours." Owen poured some oil onto his palms, rubbing them together to warm it up.

"Hmmn..." She was satisfied with what Owen said and turned her head back down, resting it comfortably against her pillows for a cushion.

’You’re saying that when your body is practically screaming to get pounded?!’ Owen’s blood boiled as he looked at her perfect curves.

Her tits were so busty that they were flattened against the mattress, while the view of her ass made his knees weak.

’Doggy style would be the best... ohh, how much I want to shove it in right now.’ His thoughts went to maximum throttle, almost bursting from overheating.

"Now, I’m going to pull down the towel on your back, Mom." Owen positioned himself like a man who wanted to take her from behind, his knees firmly planted to give him a solid sense of balance.

"Move it gently, okay~" She could feel the touch of Owen’s hands as he carefully stripped away the towel covering her upper body.

Too bad, though... she had covered her lower half with a completely separate towel!

Owen wanted to throw both towels as far as he could, but unfortunately, he had made a promise, so it was too bad.

He then gently pressed into her back like a true, professional massage therapist, hitting the muscles with perfect precision.

"Ahnn... that’s a good spot..." Her voice escaped her lips as the spot Owen targeted turned out to be an absolute bullseye.
